_comment: Test examples for listIngredientTagNames. Each example lists the saved rows and the exact answer we expect. The old local database and Supabase must give the same answer.

input.tags: Saved tag rows. The field names match the database.
input.ingredient_variant_tag_map: Saved links between ingredient variants and tags.

schema.expected: The exact answer we expect back.

fixtures.name: 01-empty-database
fixtures.description: No tags exist. The list is empty.

fixtures.name: 02-ingredient-tag-returns
fixtures.description: A visible ingredient tag comes back.

fixtures.name: 03-recipe-only-tag-is-skipped
fixtures.description: A visible recipe-only tag does not come back.

fixtures.name: 04-hidden-tag-is-skipped
fixtures.description: Hidden tags do not come back.

fixtures.name: 05-used-recipe-tag-returns
fixtures.description: A visible recipe tag already used by an ingredient variant comes back.

fixtures.name: 06-missing-use-defaults-to-recipe
fixtures.description: Missing saved use does not count as ingredient use.

fixtures.name: 07-use-ignores-case-and-spaces
fixtures.description: Saved use ignores extra spaces and upper/lower case.

fixtures.name: 08-blank-names-are-skipped
fixtures.description: Blank tag names do not come back.

fixtures.name: 09-names-are-trimmed
fixtures.description: Extra spaces around names are removed.
